author: y4rr
content:
Landed 7 native fused activation GradFns; \`prelu\` / \`glu\` split out to #614.

## What landed in \`ferrotorch_core::grad_fns::activation\`

For each activation, both the forward fn and a closed-form \`*Backward\` \`GradFn\` struct (mirroring the existing pattern for \`relu\` / \`sigmoid\` / \`gelu\` / etc.):

- \`leaky_relu(x, negative_slope)\` — VJP: \`g · (1 if x > 0 else negative_slope)\`
- \`hardtanh(x)\` / \`hardtanh_with(x, min, max)\` — VJP: \`g\` inside (min, max), 0 elsewhere
- \`relu6(x)\` — alias for \`hardtanh_with(x, 0.0, 6.0)\` so it shares the backward
- \`hardsigmoid(x) = clamp((x+3)/6, 0, 1)\` — VJP: \`g · 1/6\` inside (-3, 3), 0 outside
- \`hardswish(x) = x · hardsigmoid(x)\` — VJP: \`g · ((2x+3)/6)\` inside (-3, 3), \`g\` for \`x ≥ 3\`, 0 for \`x ≤ -3\`
- \`selu(x)\` — canonical α=1.6732632, scale=1.0507009; VJP: \`g · scale · (1 if x > 0 else α · exp(x))\`
- \`softsign(x) = x / (1 + |x|)\` — VJP: \`g / (1 + |x|)²\`

\`mish\`, \`softplus\`, \`elu\` were already native (in the existing module).

## Tests (14 new)
- Forward correctness on positive / negative / zero / saturation regions
- Backward closed-form checks at known points (e.g. \`hardswish'(1) = 5/6\`, \`softsign'(0) = 1\`)
- Numerical-vs-analytic gradient match for softsign at x=0.7 (central difference)
- \`no_grad\` context disables grad_fn attachment for all 7

62 activation tests pass total. \`cargo build -p ferrotorch-core\`: warning-clean.
\`cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast --features cuda\`: zero regressions.

## Out of scope → #614
- \`prelu\` (per-channel weight, multi-input GradFn with broadcasting + reduction)
- \`glu\` (split + sigmoid + multiply along arbitrary dim, multi-output backward routing)

Both already work correctly through the existing composition path in \`ferrotorch-nn::functional\` (added in #584); native fused versions are a perf-only win.
